# Auto-generated public-data feeds

Generated by `scripts/` via `.github/workflows/refresh-data.yml`. Do not edit by hand.

- `grid.json`       — EIA-930 demand + EIA-860 capacity → balancing-authority headroom (Primary)
- `power_econ.json` — EIA retail-sales industrial $/MWh by state (Primary)
- `queues.json`     — LBNL Queued Up active GW by ISO + 78% withdrawal haircut (Analyst)
- `siting.json`     — modeled per-state power white-space score 0–100 (Modeled)

The front-end (`index.html` → `hydrate()`) fetches these on load and merges them into
`DATA`. Feeds are **additive and degrade gracefully**: a missing or failed feed leaves
the curated `DATA` in place and never blanks a chart.
